name: Boon of Irresistible Offense
description: You increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 30. The Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage you deal always ignores Resistance. When you roll a 20 on the d20 for an attack roll, you can deal extra damage to the target equal to the ability score increased by this feat, of the same type as the attack.
